name: Fiesta Banana Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sifted Swans Down cake flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar, shortening, and eggs together until well combined.
2. Add the mashed bananas, vanilla extract, and 1/2 cup of buttermilk to the mixture. Mix until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients (flour, soda, baking powder) alternately with the remaining buttermilk and nuts, stirring after each addition.
4. Pour the batter into two greased 8-inch pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to finish cooling.
Frosting:
1. Whip heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
2. Peel and cut 3 bananas into thin, 1/4-inch slices.
3. Fold a portion of the whipped cream with finely chopped maraschino cherries into the frosting.
4. Spread the cherry-infused cream on the bottom layer of the cake.
5. Arrange half of the banana slices evenly on top of the cake.
6. Cover with the second layer and spread additional cream on top.
7. Decorate the remaining top section with the rest of the banana slices, interspersed with halved maraschino cherries.
